tagline: Production-grade memory — defense, reversible curation, and scopes.

features.title: Memory Defense
features.summary: Scrub secrets & PII out of memory — before the agent ever stores them.

example.caption: 44 built-in patterns. action "block" drops the item entirely; a memory_defense.triggered webhook logs what matched.

features.title: Reversible Memory Curation
features.summary: Fix or retire a memory — and never lose the ability to undo it.

actions.note: same memory, updated — flagged as edited
kept aside, not deleted — restore anytime

example.caption: Nothing is hard-deleted: edits stay visible as edits, and an invalidated memory can always be restored.

features.title: Observation Scopes
features.summary: Consolidate memory per tag — so each subject is queryable on its own.

example.setupLine: One lesson retained with three tags — observation_scopes decides how it consolidates:

modes.name: per_tag
modes.answers: “what does Alice struggle with, across sessions?”

modes.name: all_combinations
modes.answers: “how does Alice do with Bob specifically?”

recalls.code: recall(query="what does Alice struggle with?", tags=["student:alice"])

example.caption: Each scope is an independent consolidation pass with all_strict tag isolation — recall with the tags whose observation you want.

features.title: Local Control Center
features.summary: A built-in web app to run & configure your local instance — no separate service.

bullets: Start, stop & restart the API and control plane
Browse files and tail live logs
example.caption: Real screenshot — launch it with hindsight-embed control; embedded deployments now bundle this web app, no separate service to run.

board.title: Everything else

groups.label: providers & models
items: Native Nous Portal with built-in OAuth
Gemini Batch API for fact extraction

groups.label: reliability & fixes
items: Reliable cancellation of abandoned recall / reflect
Postgres history column widened for longer bank IDs

board.highlight: Export a bank's memory constellation as a shareable SVG poster.
